name: SAN JUAN BASIN ROYALTY TRUST
summary: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (SJT) is a statutory trust that holds royalty interests in natural gas and oil properties located in the San Juan Basin. The trust generates income from these royalty interests and distributes proceeds to unit holders. Argent Trust Company serves as the trustee, and reserve evaluations are conducted by Cawley, Gillespie & Associates, Inc.
